title: RUM-MOI FEC
short description: RUM-MOI FEC, also known as RUM-MIL 115.76 Bd, is a FSK FEC mode used by the Romanian Ministry of Internal Affairs, supposedly under military use. This is no longer used today, replaced by MIL-STD 188-110 Serial.
description:
**RUM-MOI FEC**, also known as RUM-MIL 115.76 Bd, is a FSK FEC mode used by the [Romanian Ministry of Internal Affairs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ministry_of_Internal_Affairs_(Romania)), supposedly under military use. This is no longer used today, replaced by [MIL-STD 188-110 Serial](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/MIL-STD-188-110 Serial).

RUM-MOI uses ~412 FSK shift with 115.76 Bd speed.
